summary: Tested Pet Life OS fixes: DinePage hero section with orange gradient matching LearnPage style, and FloatingContactButton with Ask Mira replacing WhatsApp. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DinePage hero section verified with orange gradient (from-orange-900/90 via-orange-800/80 to-red-800/70), badge, h1 with gradient text, description, and two CTA buttons. FloatingContactButton verified on homepage with Ask Mira option (purple/pink gradient), Call Now, and Request Callback - WhatsApp removed. Note: FloatingContactButton is intentionally hidden on pillar pages (/dine, /care, etc.) as they have their own MiraChatWidget.

dine_page_hero_orange_gradient.details: Hero section has bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-900/90 via-orange-800/80 to-red-800/70 overlay on background image

dine_page_hero_structure.details: Hero has Badge ('Fresh Meals & Pet-Friendly Dining'), H1 with gradient text ('Love & Care'), description, and two action buttons ('Shop Fresh Meals' and 'Find Restaurants')

floating_contact_ask_mira_option.details: FloatingContactButton shows 'Ask Mira' with 'AI Concierge' sublabel instead of WhatsApp

floating_contact_ask_mira_event.details: Clicking 'Ask Mira' dispatches 'openMiraAI' custom event correctly

floating_contact_fab_purple_pink.details: Main FAB button has purple/pink gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-pink-500) instead of green

floating_contact_whatsapp_removed.details: WhatsApp option no longer appears in FloatingContactButton options

code_verification.DinePage.jsx_lines_170-220: Hero section with orange gradient, badge, h1, description, two buttons - VERIFIED
code_verification.FloatingContactButton.jsx_lines_39-50: Ask Mira option with purple/pink gradient and openMiraAI event dispatch - VERIFIED
code_verification.FloatingContactButton.jsx_lines_111-126: Main FAB with purple/pink gradient - VERIFIED
